title: Cytron Maker Pi RP2040 Board Explorer
description: Students will identify each major component on the Cytron Maker Pi RP2040 board and state its function in the robot system.
creator: Dan McCreary STEM Robots
subject: Robotics
Physical Computing
Computational Thinking
MicroPython
bloomLevel: Remember (L1) — Identify the main components on the Cytron Maker Pi RP2040 board.

learningObjectives: Students will identify each major component on the Cytron Maker Pi RP2040 board and state its function in the robot system.
educational.bloomTaxonomy: Remember (L1) — Identify the main components on the Cytron Maker Pi RP2040 board.
educational.prerequisites: Basic familiarity with the robot platform and MicroPython introduced earlier in the course.

pedagogical.interactionPattern: Interactive p5.js exploration with immediate visual feedback
pedagogical.rationale: Manipulating the model and seeing the result immediately helps students build an accurate mental model before working with the physical robot.
pedagogical.assessment: Use the discussion questions in the lesson plan to check for understanding.
